title: Close snapshot verification correctness and compatibility gaps
summary: Corrected profile resolution, evidence binding and selection, cross-process locking and cancellation, operation-owned cleanliness exemptions, and rebased historical EVE references while preserving legacy readers.
userVisibleChange: Snapshot verification now fails closed on missing evidence, resolves deterministic suites, safely serializes and cancels runs across EVE processes, and gives controlled guidance for older untracked evidence.

decisions.title: Keep legacy committed evidence readable while requiring ownership for new untracked evidence
decisions.rationale: Committed historical records remain data, but newly ignored worktree evidence must be associated with an EVE-created local operation to cross the cleanliness boundary.

decisions.title: Require cancellation acknowledgement from the owning executor
decisions.rationale: A cancellation request cannot become terminal evidence until the process actually running the checks records the terminal state.

validation.output: All Go package tests passed, including legacy snapshot and run compatibility tests.
Command package tests passed under the race detector.
8 test files and 21 tests passed; the production UI build succeeded.
7 installer tests passed and package dry-run succeeded.
Verification lock and process code cross-compiled for Windows and Plan 9 targets.
